scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.pages:create: env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/wrangler-config wrangler pages project create memos-worker-web --production-branch master
scripts.deploy:web: npm run build:web && env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/wrangler-config wrangler pages deploy dist/static --project-name memos-worker-web --branch master
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:api && npm run deploy:web
